title: Microsoft Purview custom SIT rule packages
description: Desired state for custom Sensitive Information Type rule packages consumed by scripts/Deploy-SITRulePackages.ps1. See docs/adr/0061-custom-sit-rule-package-shape.md. Each entry indexes a verbatim rule-package XML file under rule-packages/. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/sit-create-a-custom-sensitive-information-type-in-scc-powershell

name.description: Human-readable rule-package name. Must equal the <Name> declared in the referenced XML's <RulePack> details.

rulePackId.description: Rule-package GUID. MUST equal the XML <RulePack id>. Repo-authored packs use the reserved synthetic namespace 00000000-0000-0000-0000-<counter> per ADR 0061 decision 2; the ADR 0055 identifier scan acquits that shape.

version.description: Rule-package version, major.minor.build.revision. MUST equal the XML <Version>. A content change requires a version bump or the service silently ignores the update (ADR 0061 decision 5).

file.description: Path to the verbatim rule-package XML, relative to the manifest, under rule-packages/.

sits.description: The SITs this pack defines, for cross-reference with the catalog and downstream policies.

name.description: The SIT display name, from the XML <LocalizedStrings> <Name> for this entity.

id.description: The SIT entity GUID, equal to the XML <Entity id>. Downstream label/auto-label/DLP YAML references this by sitId.
